headline: Palo Alto Networks Steps Deeper Into Industrial 5G And OT Security
summary: Palo Alto Networks (NasdaqGS:PANW) and Siemens have introduced a jointly verified cybersecurity solution for industrial private 5G networks. The offering provides AI-optimized, low-latency security designed for real-time production systems and data-driven industrial operations. The solution targets operational technology threats in industrial environments that rely on private 5G, aiming to reduce performance bottlenecks common with traditional IT security tools. This move places Palo Alto...
